message:
feat(fuzz): structure-aware malloc and printf fuzz targets (bd-1oz.2, bd-1oz.3)

fuzz_malloc: 10-variant AllocOp enum exercises allocate, allocate_aligned,
free, double-free, validate, lookup, and contains with invariant assertions
on every path (alignment, arena containment, slot consistency).

fuzz_printf: 8-operation printf engine fuzzer covering parse_format_spec,
parse_format_string, format_signed/unsigned/float/str/char/pointer with
all flag/width/precision/length combinations and boundary values (NaN, Inf,
i64::MIN/MAX, NULL pointer, denormals).

Both targets include seed corpus files for initial coverage bootstrapping.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
